headline: SIG Stock Gains 14% After Q4 Earnings Beat, FY27 View Signals Momentum
summary: Signet gains after reporting Q4 earnings beat as improved holiday trends, brand initiatives and its FY27 view signal momentum despite sales softness.

headline: Sally Beauty Bets on TikTok Shop to Strengthen Omnichannel Strategy
summary: SBH taps TikTok Shop to boost omnichannel reach, aiming to convert social discovery into sales as e-commerce growth and category strength support its push.

headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Wall Street’s bearish price targets for the stocks in this article signal serious concerns. Such forecasts are uncommon in an industry where maintaining cordial corporate relationships often trumps delivering the hard truth.

headline: Lands' End's Q4 Earnings Miss, U.S. Digital Segment Sales Up 5.3%
summary: LE posts modest fiscal fourth quarter growth as e-commerce strength lifts sales, though tariffs weigh on margins and profitability.
